parameters.name: list_entities
parameters.description: List Home Assistant entities. Without parameters returns a summary by domain. Parameters: domain (optional, filter by domain like light, switch, sensor, climate, media_player), search (optional, substring match on entity_id or friendly_name), limit (optional, default 50).

value.domain: ={{ $fromAI('domain', 'Entity domain filter (light, switch, sensor, climate, media_player, etc.)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_state
parameters.description: Get the current state and attributes of a specific Home Assistant entity. Parameter: entity_id (required, e.g. light.kitchen, sensor.outdoor_temperature, climate.living_room).

parameters.name: list_services
parameters.description: List available Home Assistant services. Without parameters shows all domains with their services. Parameters: domain (optional, e.g. light, climate, switch — returns detailed info incl. fields).

parameters.name: speak
parameters.description: Speak a text message on a Home Assistant voice device or speaker. Auto-selects the best path: prefers assist_satellite.announce (works reliably for HA Voice Preview Edition / HAPPE2 satellites, bypasses media_player routing), falls back to tts.speak on a media_player with a TTS engine. Parameters: message (required, text to speak), device_hint (optional, substring to match a specific device by entity_id or friendly_name — e.g. 'kitchen', 'voice'; if omitted, picks the first available device).

value.device_hint: ={{ $fromAI('device_hint', 'Optional device name/room hint to pick a specific speaker (e.g. kitchen, voice, bedroom)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: call_service
parameters.description: Call a Home Assistant service to control devices. Parameters: domain (required, e.g. light, switch, climate, media_player), service (required, e.g. turn_on, turn_off, toggle, set_temperature), entity_id (optional target entity, e.g. light.kitchen), service_data (optional JSON string with additional data like '{"brightness": 128, "rgb_color": [255,0,0]}').

value.service_data: ={{ $fromAI('service_data', 'Optional JSON string with extra service data (e.g. {"brightness":128})', 'string') }}
